code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut token_idx = 0
mut cur_start = -1

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  let is_nl = b == 10

  if is_nl
    if cur_start >= 0
      if token_idx == 1
        let tok = string.substring(text, cur_start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      token_idx = token_idx + 1
      cur_start = -1
    end
    token_idx = 0
  else if is_ws
    if cur_start >= 0
      if token_idx == 1
        let tok = string.substring(text, cur_start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      token_idx = token_idx + 1
      cur_start = -1
    end
  else
    if cur_start < 0
      cur_start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if cur_start >= 0
  if token_idx == 1
    let tok = string.substring(text, cur_start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
